programs.desc: Starfire plots a suitable super-hero revenge against her evil sister Blackfire after she is set up by her and is convicted and sent to prison, but Robin and the other teens decide to take Blackfire under wing and try and make her a better sister.

programs.desc: Beast Boy is distressed by his big new battle scar, until Cyborg convinces him that the scar makes him look tough and manly. Now Beast Boy wants to look even tougher.
